message:
fix(path): exclude routes.jsonl from FindJSONLInDir fallback

In dolt-native mode (no issues.jsonl), FindJSONLInDir falls through
to "last resort" and returns the first .jsonl file found. This
caused routes.jsonl to be used as the export target, corrupting it
with issue data and breaking all cross-rig operations.

Fixes: bd-yxyh6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
